docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY WANG, DARREN SHAOLIN AS TO DEFENDANT COSTCO   (SF) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-23-2010 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WANG, DARREN SHAOLIN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT COSTCO   (SF) THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED WAS CONTRADICTORY AND INCONCLUSIVE WHETHER DEFENDANT'S SHOPPING CARTS CONTACTED PLAINTIFF TO CAUSE HIS FALL AND INJURIES; AND DID NOT ESTABLISH ANY DANGEROUS CONDITION OF THE PREMISES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF WANG, DARREN SHAOLIN AS TO DEFENDANT COSTCO   (SF)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-03-2010, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT COSTCO   (SF)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED SEP-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-23-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-23-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. SPPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT ECHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT COSTCO   (SF)
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF WANG, DARREN SHAOLIN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-23-2010 - JUDGMENT.
